description: Leading custom AI training for clients — pre-training, SFT, RLVR, and DPO — alongside proprietary training pipelines and model architectures. Large-scale data processing and quality filtering for training corpora.
Writing about frontier AI research, new model releases, and their practical implications for engineers and operators.

Built automated AI video analysis with timestamp-aligned comprehension, chat interfaces and agentic tools for a learning management system, and the backend for dynamic model routing and context management. Designed AI systems that help students navigate coursework without enabling cheating.

Built enterprise security scanners combining authentication, domain verification, and scanning into a single optimized application. Trained coding-oriented LLMs for niche languages on NVIDIA Blackwell training rigs. Built multi-agent systems that interface with real computer environments and self-verify their own work.

Built authentication systems from scratch with passkey support, dynamic login flows, and streamlined WebAuthn. Developed a website editor that lets admins edit content, style, and layout while preserving original HTML structure. Handled Salesforce integrations for medical records and associated compliance.
Led development of the Aardvark programming language — Python reference implementation, bytecode VM, interpreter, and compiler — plus AdkCode, an online editor for the language.
